name: John Doe
history: Past experiences of pressure related to performance and social interactions. Reports presenting a confident front and hiding vulnerability. A recent business failure led to financial hardship.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I show vulnerability, people will think less of me.
intermediate_belief_depression: I must succeed to be valued.
coping_strategies: Avoids asking for help and distracts attention from problems.
situation: Took out a loan instead of asking family or friends for help. In social situations, acts to distract attention from financial difficulties.
auto_thought: I can't let anyone know I'm struggling.
behavior: Avoids discussing financial issues and maintains a facade of confidence.
